title: INTIGNIS 24 cm Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Casserole 5 L – Honeycomb Hybrid Non-Stick – Induction & All-Hob Safe – Oven Safe with Glass Lid – PFOA-Free Thick Base – Premium Polished Steel Cookware
features: [ PREMIUM TRI-PLY STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION ] Built with a durable 304 stainless-steel interior, aluminium core and magnetic steel exterior for fast, even heat distribution. No hot spots, no warping — engineered for professional cooking results.

[ HONEYCOMB ENGRAVED HYBRID NON-STICK SURFACE ] The etched honeycomb pattern protects the non-stick layer from scratches while reducing sticking during cooking. PFOA-free and designed for long-lasting everyday performance.

[ OVEN SAFE & ALL-HOBS COMPATIBLE ] The thick induction base ensures efficient heating on all hob types including induction, gas, ceramic, halogen and electric. Fully oven-safe — ideal for slow cooking, roasting and one-pot meals.

[5-LITRE FAMILY SIZE WITH GLASS LID ] Generous 24 cm / 5 L capacity perfect for curries, stews, soups and batch cooking. Includes a durable glass lid to monitor cooking without losing heat. A true kitchen essential for family meals.

[ PREMIUM FINISH & GIFT-READY PACKAGING ] Polished stainless-steel exterior with engraved bottom for a luxury look. Comes in premium branded packaging — perfect for gifting or upgrading any kitchen. Crafted for durability, safety and everyday reliability.
[ Chemical-Free & Rust-Resistant ] Made without PTFE, PFOA or harmful toxins; stainless-steel body is naturally rust-resistant and built for long-term use in busy kitchens.
